text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I just have to keep pushing forward!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Not so fast! I'll take you from the outside!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hng... Nnnghhh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Come on, Chiyo... I know you got more in you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...!
RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No way... I can't believe you managed to turn the tables from that
position...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Indeed... You are formidable.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes, quite formidable... It sets my pulse racing! Heh... Hehehehe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh! Ahem... It was a pleasure racing with you two this fine
morning.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah, um, the p-pleasure is all mine! Phew... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to express my gratitude as well. Thanks to you two, I
understand my current abilities.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: From here on out, I have to keep moving forward... one step at a time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And then, one day...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...There really is no place like Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's perfect... There are so many people I want to race. So many!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's up with you? Normally you're just zonin' out, but here you are
gettin' all fired up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Guess I'll have some fun 'n' gas the flame. How's about another run?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're on... I'm going to win.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I won't lose. Not to you, not to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ha! You sure know how to make me laugh. Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, I just can't take it anymore. ♪ Everyone's such a cutie patootie.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Right? So, are you just going to watch, Maruzen?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, C.B.! Hiya there. You say that, but I see you still have your
uniform on.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: No uniform can stop me from running. If we want to run, nothing can stop us. Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I can feel the passion! Hearing that does kind of give me the
itch to run...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But we can't. There aren't many things scarier than being on the
Emperor's bad side.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I am pleased to see you in high spirits, but yes. We are to be
role models for the younger generations.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As such, please refrain from any behavior that sets a less-than-fine
example... is what I must say as student council president.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
This uniform is more than durable enough to handle a little bit of
running. I think you're being a little strict.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: More than a little.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Her "Majesty" is like if strict and stern had a baby and named it
"boring."

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
C.B., Maruzen, let's ditch her and go have some fun. Don't worry, we
can tie her to her throne in the meantime.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: We'll see how long that throne of cards can hold her weight.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on! Really, Sirius? How is it that you and Rudolf are like oil
and water. I thought you were childhood friends! Can't you, you
know—

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You sure like to run your mouth, don't you, Maruzen? I, for one, prefer
to run my legs.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
And I'm especially excited to play the part of the blazing star that
consumes the crimson Beast.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Stop iiit. You're giving me the heebie-jeebies.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You're a bit of a talker yourself, Sirius. If we're going to do this,
let's do it. Hurry, before—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hold it right there.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You're aware class is beginning soon, I hope. You'd best start heading
to your classrooms.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And besides, is right now truly the best time to put that energy to
use? If you would but save it for an appropriate time and location, I'll
gladly assist in exhausting it.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...Hah. You're on. I'll wipe that condescension right off your face.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Soon enough, you'll be looking up at me, Rudolf!
